name: Round-up Beef (for a Crowd)
recipeIngredient: 1 ¼ cups Brown Sugar, Firmly Packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge strips of beef in flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Brown in oil.
3. Combine water, catsup, brown sugar, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, and chopped onions in a bowl. Stir well.
4. Heat the mixture until boiling, then pour over the beef.
5. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and cook covered until beef is tender (about 2 hours). Stir occasionally.
6. Serves 20 - 25 and freezes well.
